title: [FIRRTL] Mux Result Type Inference Asserting Out

features.name: mux with mixed-width operands requiring type promotion
features.description: Code should include a ternary mux operation where the two operand operands have different bit widths, requiring type inference to promote the narrower operand
features.snippet: logic [31:0] b; logic a; logic sel; assign c = sel ? {{31{a}}, a} : b;

features.name: mux result type from wider operand
features.description: Code should include a ternary mux operation where the result type is inferred from the wider operand and the narrower operand requires zero-extension
features.snippet: logic [31:0] result; logic [0:0] narrow; logic [31:0] wide; assign result = sel ? {31'b0, narrow} : wide;
